feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to make a CFL based field non-editable in SAP GUI transaction ?
entry.content:
I am trying to add a field to Business Context PS_PROJECT using Custom Fields App.

I am able to add the field and enable it on Project Definition tcodes ( CJ01/02/03 )

Having said that the field is editable by default. Now i have a required to make this field non-editable. Key point here is this field is on a SAP-GUI transaction and not out of the box Fiori app

How can this be achieved ?

entry.title: Java Component NW731 (Location of installation media)
entry.content:
We are performing a system copy based on AS ABAP and AS Java with SAP EHP1 FOR SAP NETWEAVER 7.3.

SWPM requires "Java Component NW731 (folder JAVA_J2EE_OSINDEP)", but where can I install this from?
■SWPM 1.0/2.0 out-of-support SWPM10_IM_WINDOWS_X86_64(SWPM10RMSP30_0.SAR)

I searched for SAP EHP1 FOR SAP NETWEAVER 7.3 (SUPPORT PACKAGES AND PATCHES) on the Software Download Center, but I couldn't find Java Component.

Please could someone help us to find the location of correct Medias.

best regards

entry.title: New External directory for external server
entry.content:
Hi All,

is there a way to create a external directory in external server so the results files from a program export these files into it.

entry.title: ST22 DUMP NOT GENERATED AFTER BACKGROUND JOB CANCELLED
entry.content:
Hi,

After getting the below error in background job log, but we couldn't see ST22 dump.

Job started
Step 001 started (program <program name>, variant <variant name>, user ID <user id>)
Internal session terminated with a runtime error HTTP_NO_MEMORY (see ST22)
Job cancelled

I'm getting below error when I tried to open the st22 dumps (this is the right after job cancellation)

The short dump <timestamp>1 <Profile name> <user id> no longer exists

Regards

Ajaruddin

entry.title: Connect to SAP ECC via ODBC - Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio (MSSMS)
entry.content:
PRE-REQUISITES: 

ODBC Driver Installation: The first step involves installing the correct ODBC driver that facilitates communication between SQL Server and SAP ECC. This driver acts as a bridge, translating SQL queries into a format understandable by SAP ECC. The choice of driver must match the versions of SQL Server and SAP ECC to ensure compatibility and functionality. 

ODBC Data Source Configuration: Once the driver is installed, configuring the ODBC Data Source Name (DSN) is crucial. This configuration involves: 

  • Specifying the SAP ECC server details, including the hostname, port, and client number. 
  • Inputting user credentials and connection parameters. 
  • Testing the DSN to verify that it successfully connects to the SAP ECC system without errors. 

          SQL Server Linked Server Setup: The next phase is configuring SQL Server to use the ODBC DSN: 

Linked Server Creation: A new linked server is created in SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS) to integrate with the ODBC DSN. This involves selecting the "Microsoft OLE DB Provider for ODBC Drivers" and linking it to the previously configured DSN. 

Security Configuration: Security settings must be established to define how SQL Server will authenticate to SAP ECC. This may involve mapping SQL Server logins to SAP credentials, ensuring secure and appropriate access. 

STEP-BY-STEP - ESTABLISH CONNECTION BETWEEN ECC AND ODBC 

1. Ensure that the computer that is going to be used for configuring ODBC is connected to the same server network segment; otherwise, the connection will not work. To check if the IP is reachable, use the `ping` command in Command Prompt. 

2. Open ODBC Administrator (64-bit or depending on the systems) and click on “add”, select SQL Server and click on finish. 

3. In the next screen enter the IP from the server that want to connect to (To know the IP #, ping in the system ipconfig in a CMD):  

4. Then click on next and enter the user and password configured or provided by your ECC administrator (on the server side)  

5. If is connected successfully then your system will appeared in the next screen. Select the desired one

6. Then click on finish  

7. Then click on Test

8. Connection Established: 

STEP-BY-STEP: ESTABLISH CONNECTION BETWEEN ECC AND SQL SERVER

1. Open Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio (MSSMS) or your preferred management tool, right click on Linked server and click on “New Linked Server” (Create an account)

2. Enter a name for the Linked Server and specify the product name. Then, choose "Microsoft OLE DB Provider for ODBC Drivers" and input the name of the previously established connection in the data source field

3. Click on Security Page and enter the user and password created previously.  

4. After Refreshing, right click on the linked server and click on “Test Connection” 

The system is Up and running: 

Finally you can create a request to any of your tables that you need as the following example:

I hope this blog has helped you! 👽

entry.title: Adobe Document Services on SLES 15 SP6 non latin characters - warning !!!
entry.content:
Hello

If someone thinks about upgrading it's SAP Netweaver  Adobe Document Services installation to SLES 15 SP6 and is using non latin characters on printouts - do not proceed !!

It is not possible to print non latin characters then. There is no fix yet - you'll need to go back to SLES SP 5.

Regards

Marcin

entry.title: How to Enable SolMan Incident Approval Directly from Email in SAP Solution Manager?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In SAP Solution Manager, when a user creates a ticket, an email notification is automatically sent to the department manager for approval. Currently, the department manager needs to log into SAP Solution Manager to change the ticket status from 'Open' to 'Release.'

I want to enhance this process so that the department manager can approve the ticket directly from the email notification itself. Specifically, when the manager clicks 'Approve' in the email, the ticket status in SAP Solution Manager should automatically update from 'Open' to 'Release.'

My questions are:

  1. How can I integrate this functionality with the email triggered by SAP Solution Manager?

  2. Is it feasible to implement this kind of email-based approval within SAP Solution Manager?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you!

entry.title: 0PROFIT_CTR_0106_HIER unable to load 2 different hierarchy into BW with 2 Infopackage
entry.content:
Hi all,

For the DS 0PROFIT_CTR_0106_HIER, we got 2 hierarchy (GGGPROFITCTR1, GGGPROFITCTR2) to load, I have created Infopage for GGGPROFITCTR1 and save info package and tried to create another info package and selected GGGPROFITCTR2, while saving always info package selection changes to GGGPROFITCTR1, in selection screen for 2 different info packages selects only one hierarchy.

Kindly advise how to load 2 hierarchy in BW 7.5.

Regards

Maran

entry.title: Error During Installing SAP NetWeaver 7.52
entry.content:
I want to install SAP NetWeaver 7.52 SP and  this error appears "Abort execution because of Step returns modlib.jslib.caughtException"


Is there any solution for problem?

Uploaded last installiation log

 

To install this TestDrive you have to accept 
the SAP COMMUNITY DEVELOPER License (DEV).
Do you agree to the above license terms? yes/no:
User's response to the accept license prompt = 'y'
Please enter a password:
Please re-enter password for verification:
extracting data archives...
extracting /media/sf_ABAP752/server/TAR/x86_64/dbdata.tgz-*
extracting /media/sf_ABAP752/server/TAR/x86_64/dblog.tgz-*
extracting /media/sf_ABAP752/server/TAR/x86_64/dbexe.tgz-*
extracting /media/sf_ABAP752/server/TAR/x86_64/usrsap.tgz-*
extracting /media/sf_ABAP752/server/TAR/x86_64/sapmnt.tgz-*
Checking Linux kernel memory management parameters according to SAP Note 941735
Backing up /etc/sysctl.conf in /etc/sysctl.backup
Checking Linux kernel parameter vm.max_map_count according to SAP Note 900929
Checking presence of new SYBASE license files
Replaced the license file /sybase/NPL/SYSAM-2_0/licenses/SYBASE_ASE_TestDrive.lic
Install service
Check Installation Path ...

saphostexec is already running (pid=10802). Stopping...Stopped
ok
Copy Executable ...
ok
Generate Profile ...
ok
Install SYS-V service ...
[WARNING] installsapinit.sh exit with status 5
-> Start /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/saphostexec pf=/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/host_profile <- 
start hostcontrol using profile /usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/host_profile
ok
[OK] SAPHostExec / SAPHostControl succesfully installed
Executing: "/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/SAPCAR" -xvf "./SHADBMETRICSDEF.SAR" -R "/usr/sap/hostctrl/exe/config.d" 
SAPCAR: processing archive ./SHADBMETRICSDEF.SAR (version 2.01)
x dbmetric.definition.db4.cimobj

=>sapparam(1c): No Profile used.
=>sapparam: SAPSYSTEMNAME neither in Profile nor in Commandline

Abort execution because of 
Step returns modlib.jslib.caughtException

Error code: 20

* mount

entry.title: About installation of Solution Manager in archived versions
entry.content:
We are not able to see Solution manager 7.2 JAVA SPS16 stack in Maintenance Planner.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP SLICENSE - Warning Message while Login after we renewed it
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

In GGP Production system, we have renewed our SLICENSE for our corresponding Hardware key.

Even though, we are getting the warning pop message while login to the system.

Could you please help to fix this issue.

Regards,

Krishna

entry.title: USMM2 measurment 1160 fails with error You are not authorized to execute this program.
entry.content:
In my monthly run of USMM2 in a SAP ERP 7.50 system, the Measurement of application 1160 ("SAP Solutions by OpenText") fails with an error "You are not authorized to execute this program." (Message no. /OTX/PF09_M_001023). Apparently this is a new measurement, because it is not present in last month's report. 
In september we updated component OTEXVIM to version 80700_006, SP 0005.
Did anyone else encounter the same error and have any idea how to solve the authorization issue?

entry.title: Different server groups for different queues in SMQR
entry.content:
Is it possible to assign different server groups for different inbound qRFC queues in SMQR (instead of one for all)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Self Billing Price change
entry.content:
Hello,

I work in an automobile industry and we are currently facing issues with self billing due to price change.

Scenario ;

Sale of car parts

First payment made by customer 19128,73 and second payment for 2822,94. This 2 payments are as a result of a unit price change from 42.08 to 48.29 .

Below screen corresponds to the customers portal showing how much they have paid

Below is the vendors SAP screen whereby we are unable to identify the additional 2822,94 made

Accounts receivable team is unable to do cash allocation as the second payment is not showing in SAP. Please how can this be solved ?

Is there a automatic way of resolving this issue ?

entry.title: TR lists in CHARM - Post import in TST after system copy completed
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can we get the TR list only moved to TST not moved to PRD in Charm?

After system copy completed, we need to reimport the TRs into TST?

How to check only TRs moved to TST in Charm?

entry.title: System copy PRD to TST - Charm pre-requites required
entry.content:
We are planning system copy from PRD to TST and We are using Solution manager for ITSM, Charm.

Is there any specific activity to be perform if the system using ITSM & Charm process?

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver - REST API Installation - Documentation
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I would need help in finding the documentation that explains how to install the verison 2 of the REST API on SAP NetWeaver. I am trying to find the documentation on this topic but I am lost in the maze of all available documentation. If someone could point me to this documentation, it would be very appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: customer statement using transaction code F.17
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Can i have a detailed process of how to download customer statement using transaction code F.17

entry.title: CRM and NetWeaver version compatibility
entry.content:
Hi All, Could anybody tell me Which version of CRM is compatible with NetWeaver 7.5 ?

Is CRM version 705 compatible with NetWeaver 7.5?
